name: crew
description: Marketplace for the crew plugin and its cross-model verifier dependency.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: An iterative development loop as three skills — flow (the loop), auditor (correctness), editor (written-content) — reviewing each unit as it lands, with chunk- and turn-level gates adding cross-model Codex and a /code-review pass.

plugins.name: skill-codex
plugins.description: Delegate prompts to OpenAI Codex CLI — crew's cross-model verifier. Sha-pinned; upstream: skills-directory/skill-codex.
